mapper.update: UPDATE article_like SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE article_favorite SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_favorite WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = 1
